title: centaurea jacea var. transalpina
intro: Centaurea jacea var. transalpina, also known as Mountain Knapweed, is a perennial plant species in the daisy family that is native to the mountains of Europe. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it effective in treating wounds and skin conditions. The health benefits of Mountain Knapweed include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting immune function. The herbal preparation of Mountain Knapweed typically involves drying the flowers and leaves, which can be used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures for medicinal purposes.
